# MuleSoft OpenWeatherMap Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of OpenWeatherMap Connector documentation.
> See [OpenWeatherMap Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/openweathermap-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the OpenWeatherMap Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [OpenWeatherMap Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/openweathermap-connector/latest/index.md)
- [OpenWeatherMap Connector 1.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/openweathermap-connector/latest/openweathermap-connector-reference.md)
